productDisplayName: Jockey Women Navy Blue Lounge Pants
description: Style NoteGive your wardrobe a fashionable edge with these lounge pants from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Product DetailsNavy blue pants that have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring for a customised Fit, rubber print on the left thigh and is designed to be worn as lounge wear, leisure wear and active wearMaterial and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorations
